mapper.select:
SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(p.payment_date, '%m/%d')
CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(p.payment_date, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(p.payment_date) DAY), '%m/%d'), '주')
DATE_FORMAT(p.payment_date, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(p.payment_date, '%Y-%m')
AS label, IFNULL(SUM(p.payment_price), 0) AS sales, 0 AS percent FROM PAYMENT p JOIN MEMBERSHIP m ON p.membership_id = m.id WHERE m.gym_id = #{gymNum} AND p.status = '결제완료'
AND DATE(p.payment_date) >= #{startDate}
AND DATE(p.payment_date) <= #{endDate}
AND LOWER(m.type) = #{membershipType}
GROUP BY
DATE(p.payment_date)
YEARWEEK(p.payment_date, 1)
YEAR(p.payment_date)
DATE_FORMAT(p.payment_date, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY MIN(p.payment_date)

SELECT t.id AS trainerId, tu.name AS trainerName, tu.profile_image AS profileImg, IFNULL(p.totalSales, 0) AS totalSales, IFNULL(ps.sessionCount, 0) AS sessionCount FROM TRAINER t JOIN `USER` tu ON t.user_id = tu.id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT m.trainer_id, SUM(p.payment_price) AS totalSales FROM PAYMENT p JOIN MEMBERSHIP m ON p.membership_id = m.id WHERE p.status = '결제완료' AND m.type = 'pt'
AND DATE(p.payment_date) >= #{startDate}
AND DATE(p.payment_date) <= #{endDate}
GROUP BY m.trainer_id ) p ON p.trainer_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT trainer_id, COUNT(*) AS sessionCount FROM LESSON GROUP BY trainer_id ) ps ON ps.trainer_id = t.id
WHERE t.gym_id = #{gymNum} ORDER BY totalSales DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT t.id AS trainerId, u.name AS trainerName FROM TRAINER t JOIN `USER` u ON t.user_id = u.id WHERE t.gym_id = #{value} ORDER BY u.name
